generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underfunding our military puts our nation at risk. While some worry about budget priorities, remember: a strong defense is the best way to avoid costly conflicts. Our allies are counting on us, and cutting spending now could mean paying a much higher price later. #NationalSecurity #VeteransForStrength
